items.name_en: ✨【LV X TM SPEEDY BANDOULIÈRE 25】M13805 M13085
items.name_cn:
✨【LV X TM SPEEDY BANDOULIÈRE 25】M13805 M13085
This Speedy Bandoulière 25 gx tri-color bag renders the classic Monogram pattern in bright colors inspired by Japanese artist Takashi Murakami, showcasing the dynamic charm of the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami collaboration series together with the bow-shaped key pouch. Calfskin creates the Toron handle and a detachable, adjustable shoulder strap. The dazzling lock and corners draw inspiration from the brand's luggage elements.
Size: 25 x 19 x 15 cm (Length x Height x Width)

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_en: ✨M13397 White & Color. Flap Wallet. New LV x TM Portfolio Sarah NM. A wallet paying tribute to Maison luggage, the 'LV × TM Portfolio Sarah NM'. The slightly rectangular shape features calfskin trimming, with gold screws decorating the corners of the front flap. The playful rainbow-colored letter pattern canvas is exclusive to the reissue of the 'Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami' series. The interior features 2 large compartments and multiple pockets with 12 card slots, which is also very attractive. 19 x 10.5 x 2 cm.

items.name_en: ✨M14194 White Color Mini Baguette Series Nano Diane JhLt Baguette Handbag M14194 White Color (Three Colors - Takashi Murakami) The Nano Diane, crafted from two-tone Monogram Empreinte LT leather, is a miniature version of the iconic Diane bag. This meticulously crafted piece features all key details of the original design, including a round flap, piped edges, and a strap-style magnetic closure. Its detachable handle and detachable adjustable shoulder strap offer different carrying options. Dimensions: 19 x 10.5 x 6 cm

items.name_en: 🎁Model: M46643 Monogram Vintage Saddle. 🥇Original Leather. This Micro Chantilly handbag is made of Monogram canvas, with a unique shape and small size that adds an elegant touch to any outfit. Inspired by the original Chantilly bag first introduced in 1978, it is exquisitely crafted and highly practical, with meticulous design that makes the bag even more refined. The bag comes with a detachable and adjustable shoulder strap, which can be worn on the shoulder or diagonally.

items.name_cn: 👑Original, Model: M46740 Monogram Mini Twisted. The Monogram canvas Saumur BB handbag reinterprets a beloved archival design in a modern style. The saddle bag shape and natural cowhide strap buckle evoke a equestrian spirit, but the front buckle hides a magnetic closure: convenient and modern. This small bag has space to store a day's essentials and is versatile due to the detachable shoulder strap and handle. Size: 20x15x7.5cm
